name: Acceso Inusual a Archivos Detectado
description: Se ha detectado un volumen inusualmente alto de accesos a archivos en un sistema Windows, lo que podría indicar un intento de exfiltración de datos o una actividad de reconocimiento maliciosa.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the earliest event in the aggregation window.

parameters.name: SubjectUserName
parameters.description: The username that accessed the file.

parameters.name: ObjectName
parameters.description: The full path of the file or directory that was accessed.

parameters.name: IpAddress
parameters.description: The source IP address of the access, if available in the log.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The total count of file access events within the aggregation window.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The name of the computer where the event occurred.
